reviews.comment:
Fui a almorzar en el full, me sorprendió, muy simple y deliciosa comida y muy amables todas las Chicas, Gracias

(Translated by Google)
I went to lunch at Full, and I was surprised by the simple yet delicious food and the very friendly staff. Thank you!
